# Tornado

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Tornado icon">

class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" ## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Tornado;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Tornado { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
weather, wind, storm, hurricane

## Categories
weather

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/tornado)
